content: Curiosity-driven active learning agents (the SOTA 2024-2025 focus on dynamic memory for open-ended exploration) can repurpose online meta-learning’s catastrophic forgetting mitigation frameworks to selectively consolidate only high-curiosity episodic memories instead of all encountered data. This creates a 'goal-aligned memory system that retains only information that drives future exploration, rather than wasting capacity on trivial, low-novelty observations.
source_topics: Online meta-learning memory consolidation with catastrophic forgetting mitigation
